title: ProDec Contractor 12ft x 9ft Cotton Dust Sheet for Decorating, Carpet Protector, Washable Drop Cloth, Paint Shield, Painting Sheets, Heavy Duty Dust Sheets for Furniture, Paint Cloth
features: This is one of ProDec's range of cotton twill dust sheets for painting and protection of floors and furniture against liquid spills and dust whilst decorating

The carpet cover protector is super absorbent, made from hardwearing cotton twill that soaks up small paint splashes, absorbs spills and minimises transfer of dust and debris, enabling you to protect carpets, hard floors and furniture when painting
TRADE QUALITY: the sheet has a woven, tear resistant construction with hemmed edges to prevent fraying, so it won't let you down even after repeated use
SIZE: 12' x 9' (3.7m x 2.7m) ideal for covering floor areas and furniture such as sofas, chairs, tables, bookcases, etc
REUSABLE: ProDec cotton dust sheets are machine washable for longer life (low temperature cycle recommended)
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Contractor cotton dust sheets - superb value protection Cotton dust sheets are a classic decorator's staple - unlike polythene sheeting they always stay in place once put down. This sheet is made from hardwearing cotton twill that enables you to protect carpets, hard floors and furniture when painting. The absorbent, lightweight cotton soaks up small splashes of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids, as well as minimising the transfer of dust and debris. It has a woven, tear resistant construction with hemmed edges to prevent fraying, so it won't let you down even after repeated use. It drapes well, enabling you to use it not just on floors but also across furniture and is easily folded for storage after use. The sheet is machine washable for longer life (a low temperature cycle is recommended to minimise shrinkage). This sheet is 12' x 9' (3.7m x 2.7m) which is the most popular trade size, ideal for floor areas and furniture such as sofas, chairs, etc. If you want more protection against spills, consider the ProDec Contractor range of polythene backed cotton dust sheets which feature a water resistant backing that prevents tread-through of liquids to the surface below. More temporary protection solutions from ProDec ProDec has a range of products for protecting floors and furniture against paint drips, splashes, spills, dust, dirt and more during decorating and general maintenance work. Polythene dust sheets Made from dustproof and waterproof LDPE material and available in both sheets and rolls, polythene is lightweight and cost-effective. Super Cling Super Cling is dustproof and waterproof LDPE material that has been statically charged to enable it to cling to virtually any surface without the need for taping, including walls, windows, doors, upholstery, bookcases, furniture, cabinets and much more. Self-adhesive films Made from puncture resistant polythene that enables it to withstand heavy traffic, ProDec’s self-adhesive film protects against liquid spills such as paint, varnish, wallpaper paste, oil, grease, mud and more. It applies easily without the need for any special application tools and stays in place once down. Available in Carpet, Hard Floor and Glass grades. Cotton dust sheets Classic cotton twill fabric that soaks up small splashes of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids, as well as minimising the transfer of dust and debris. Available in a range of sizes in both standard and Protector waterproof plastic backed versions.
